quality_notes: Add vulnerability: mention a mistake, failure, or lesson learned. Try 'I was wrong', 'took me years to learn', or 'finally understood'.
Remove unsupported numeric claims and metrics unless the topic explicitly provided them.
Remove unsupported hard stats (percentages, millions, salary figures) unless provided in the topic.
Add more relevant emojis to improve scanability and engagement (target: 4 to 10).
Align the post more closely to the planned diagram labels so the image and text tell the same story.
Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
📌 FinOps for AI Systems

I'm surprised by the hefty price tag of Claude Code, which can cost up to $200 a month. As an engineer, I believe that AI-powered coding tools should be accessible to all, not just those with deep pockets.

Cost Comparison
Claude Code: $200/month
Goose: free

The fact that Goose offers similar functionality for free raises questions about the value proposition of Claude Code. I think Anthropic needs to revisit its pricing strategy to make Claude Code more competitive in the market. What will it take for AI coding tools to become a staple in every engineer's toolkit, rather than a luxury only a few can afford? 💬 Can we make AI-powered coding accessible to all? #AICoding #AccessibilityMatters #CodingTools #ArtificialIntelligence #EngineersUnite #CodingOnABudget
